title: Simple Snacks
description: Enjoy a bunch of new foods in Minecraft!
body:
Thank you for downloading Simple Snacks! Here is the list of new foods and how to craft them:

## Foods:
<details>
<summary>Rice</summary>

Rice is a raw material that can be obtained by destroying grass, similar to wheat seeds. Rice is used for other recipies, however you are able to eat raw rice.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Bowl of Rice</summary>

![Rice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8903328587e5a2ae39d6e49603f835a8c4329856.png)

Crafted with:
- 3 rice
- 1 bowl

</details>


<details>
<summary>Cosmic Brownie</summary>

![brownie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1505e8dfc24358056e2d870f1a114ab63444aed9.png)

Crafted with:
- 2 buckets of milk
- 2 coco beans
- 2 sugar
- 2 wheat
- 1 egg

</details>


<details>
<summary>Cheese</summary>

![cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc93bb93368c4c619d4a74618b2734951a4abc10.png)

Crafted with:
- 4 buckets of milk

</details>


<details>
<summary>Cheeseburger</summary>

![cheeseburger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b75578c0e6c360b9d5c02b61c342e091bdd8db.png)

Crafted with:
- 2 bread
- 1 steak
- 1 cheese

</details>


<details>
<summary>Ice Cream</summary>

![icecream](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a905e251f7e9a447cd6cebda35c30e3e8fbcb93.png)

Crafted with:
- 4 sugar
- 1 bucket of milk

</details>


<details>
<summary>Pizza</summary>

![pizza](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ca89e73bc44ee5a31bcd574e613f3c1c024983f.png)

Crafted with:
- 1 bread
- 1 cheese
- 1 beetroot

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sushi</summary>

![sushi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72ed6205cb40e16db645bb29ecc592da92a54c9b.gif)

Crafted with:
- 1 dried kelp
- 1 rice
- 1 fish (Salmon, Cod, or Tropical fish)

*Tip: make sushi with a Puffershish to poison it!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Taco</summary>

![taco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c80654a7430a61a64c1bf6abeabd6f721ffdbb1.png)

Crafted with:
- 3 bread
- 1 steak

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mac and Cheese</summary>

![mac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b337e3cb651ff41e760850fae27a1ac257f74a.png)

Crafted with:
- 1 bowl
- 1 wheat
- 1 cheese

</details>



<details>
<summary>Apple Pie</summary>

![apple pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3a5195f22134213e067f4a644f7350fac98fdb3.png)

Crafted with:
- 3 bread
- 1 apple
- 1 sugar

</details>


<details>
<summary>Poison Apple</summary>

![poison apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c69e61ba40ae39df35b8e3bfdd0bb6acf5de098.png)

Crafted with:
- 1 apple
- 1 poisonous potato

</details>


<details>
<summary>French Fries</summary>


![fries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08ee5f1e524a969f14fcca3ad985a6c873debf0.png)

Crafted with:
- 1 baked potato

</details>



<details>
<summary>Donut</summary>


![donut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/093f9d9dc99e8affaec621ac2e99782142c27c30.png)

Crafted with:
- 4 bread
- 1 sugar

</details>


<details>
<summary>Popsicle</summary>

![popsicle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/656918bbe2f59203cd92beacc8701206cf53f398.png)

Crafted with:
- 1 stick
- 1 ice
- 1 sugar

</details>


<details>
<summary>Hot Dog</summary>

![hot dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae54dacbb128ada3e13deed66d67a335cde73c55.png)

Crafted with:
- 3 bread
- 1 cooked porkchop

</details>



<details>
<summary>Stir Fry</summary>

![stir fry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6a76e8b6f2fbb6b625a19dc70ad66d9b9cf6eff.png)

Crafted with:
- 3 rice
- 1 bowl
- 1 cooked chicken
- 1 carrot
- 1 beetroot

</details>


<details>
<summary>Drumstick</summary>

![drumstick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d6cc01a6e8d6eec6836bc85b54b6cb565394cf7.png)

Crafted with:
- 1 cooked chicken

</details>


<details>
<summary>Croissant</summary>

![croissant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf3fa7e172578ae4b01566214ffa3425d0dd2e6.png)

Crafted with:
- 3 bread

</details>


---

You can also type */function mfood:give_all* to recieve all foods :)

Thank you for downloading, hope you enjoy!
